gloss_en: I speak in Basque.
notes: Biscayan 'berba' (word), 'dot' (I do) and 'euskeraz' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003; the apical fricative merger ⟨z⟩→[s̺] per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: I want to drink cold water.
notes: Biscayan volitive 'gura' with ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'hotza' and ⟨h⟩ [h] per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: The black dog is behind the house.
notes: Biscayan 'baltz' (black); ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txakur', 'etxe' and apical merger per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: Seven friends have come to the village.
notes: Fricative ⟨z⟩→[s̺] apical merger 'zazpi' and trill 'herrira' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: You yourself told the truth.
notes: Biscayan intensive 'zeuk' and 'dozu'; apical merger ⟨z⟩→[s̺] and apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'esan' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: The sea looks black today.
notes: Apical affricate ⟨ts⟩ 'itsasoa' with the Biscayan sibilant profile per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: The rooster crows at dawn.
notes: Biscayan '-etan' imperfective and 'dau'; palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'ollarrak' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: I am ill, with a headache.
notes: Biscayan comitative '-gaz'; post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'gaixorik' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: My heart is still strong.
notes: Biscayan 'oraindino' (still) and 'daukat'; ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'bihotza', ⟨h⟩ [h] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The old woman tells the tale.
notes: Biscayan 'andra' and '-etan'; apical merger ⟨z⟩→[s̺] 'zaharrak' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: We have gathered fine mushrooms in the forest.
notes: Biscayan 'batu' (gather) and plural object 'doguz'; palatal ⟨dd⟩ [ɟ] 'onddo' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

gloss_en: The child ate a tiny bit.
notes: Biscayan 'ume', 'dau'; ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txikitxo' per hualde_ortiz_de_urbina2003.

sentence: Xagu txiki bat sartu da tokira.
ipa: ʃaɡu tʃiki bat s̺artu da tokiɾa
gloss_en: A little mouse got into the spot.
notes: Post-alveolar ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xagu' and ⟨tx⟩ [tʃ] 'txiki'; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'sartu' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: You must wash your hands.
notes: Biscayan plural 'dozuz'; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'eskuak' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'behar' per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: Let us speak with one another.
notes: Biscayan 'daigun', 'alkarregaz'; apical merger 'egin'→profile per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: You left the salt on the table.
notes: Biscayan 'ganean', 'itxi'; laminal affricate ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] 'gatza' and ⟨h⟩ [h] 'mahai' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: The big tree is losing its leaves.
notes: Biscayan 'orri', '-duten'; ⟨h⟩ [h] 'zuhaitz', 'handiak' and ⟨tz⟩ [ts̻] per hualde2018_aspiration.

gloss_en: The youngsters go about together.
notes: Biscayan 'alkarregaz', 'dabiltz'; apical ⟨s⟩ [s̺] 'neska' per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: The old castle stands on the hill.
notes: Apical merger ⟨z⟩→[s̺] 'gaztelu', 'zaharra' — the Biscayan neutralisation per bedialauneta_hualde2023.

gloss_en: When do the village festivals begin?
notes: ⟨h⟩ [h] 'herriko', 'hasten', trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] and apical profile per hualde2018_aspiration.
